title: 전치사 + 동명사
explanation: 전치사 뒤에는 동사원형이 아니라 동명사(-ing)가 와야 한다.

examples.sentence: The manager is responsible for _____ the new employees before their first day.
Instead of _____ the report by email, please submit it in person.
The board postponed the decision without _____ all the financial data.

title: 관계대명사
explanation: 선행사가 사람이면 who/whom, 사물이면 which, 소유격은 whose를 쓴다.

examples.sentence: The employee _____ submitted the proposal received a bonus.
This is the software _____ features were recently upgraded.
The contract, _____ was signed last week, includes a confidentiality clause.

title: 분사구문 (현재분사/과거분사 수식)
explanation: 능동·진행 의미면 현재분사(-ing), 수동·완료 의미면 과거분사(p.p.)를 명사 앞뒤에서 수식어로 쓴다.

examples.sentence: _____ the budget report, the finance team found several errors.
The documents _____ on the desk need to be filed by noon.
_____ with the results, the director approved the expansion plan.

title: 동명사 vs to부정사
explanation: 동사에 따라 목적어로 동명사만, to부정사만, 혹은 둘 다 취하는 경우가 다르다(예: consider+동명사, decide+to부정사).

examples.sentence: The committee decided _____ the meeting until next Monday.
Please consider _____ your feedback before the survey closes.
The firm plans _____ its operations into new markets next year.

title: 비교급
explanation: 형용사·부사의 비교급은 '-er' 또는 'more + 원급'으로 만들고, 뒤에 than이 온다.

examples.sentence: The new printer works _____ than the old one.
This year's profits were _____ than last year's.
Customer satisfaction is _____ important than short-term profit for our brand.

title: 접속부사
explanation: however, therefore, in addition 등 접속부사는 문장과 문장을 논리적으로 연결하며, 보통 세미콜론이나 마침표 뒤 콤마와 함께 쓴다.

examples.sentence: Sales dropped in the first quarter; _____, the company decided to cut marketing costs.
The flight was delayed by two hours; _____, most passengers missed their connections.
The proposal was well received; _____, some board members had concerns about the budget.

title: 수동태
explanation: 행위의 대상이 주어가 될 때 'be + p.p.' 형태의 수동태를 쓴다.

examples.sentence: The annual report _____ by the finance team every January.
All applications _____ carefully before the interview stage.
The new policy _____ to all employees at the meeting yesterday.

title: 가정법 (조건문)
explanation: 현재 사실과 반대되는 가정은 'If + 과거형, 주어 + would + 동사원형' 구조를 쓴다.

examples.sentence: If the shipment _____ on time, we would not lose the client.
If I _____ the budget, I would hire two more designers.
The project would succeed if the team _____ more resources.

title: 등위상관접속사
explanation: both A and B, either A or B, neither A nor B, not only A but also B처럼 짝을 이루는 접속사는 A와 B 자리에 문법적으로 대등한 형태를 써야 한다.

examples.sentence: The new policy applies to both full-time _____ part-time employees.
Employees can submit the form either by email _____ in person at the front desk.
The proposal was not only cost-effective _____ also environmentally friendly.

title: 명사절 접속사
explanation: that, whether, what 등은 문장 전체를 명사처럼 만들어 주어·목적어 자리에 쓰이는 명사절을 이끈다.

examples.sentence: The manager confirmed _____ the shipment would arrive by Friday.
It is unclear _____ the merger will be approved by the board.
The survey revealed _____ customers value most about the service.

title: 부정대명사/부정형용사
explanation: each, every는 단수 취급, another는 '또 다른 하나', other/others는 나머지를 가리키는 등 수와 지시 대상에 맞게 골라 써야 한다.

examples.sentence: _____ employee must complete the safety training before starting work.
The first proposal was rejected, so the committee reviewed _____ one.
Some workers prefer remote work, while _____ favor the office.

title: 형용사 vs 부사 자리
explanation: 형용사는 명사를 앞에서 수식하고, 부사는 동사·형용사·문장 전체를 수식한다. 명사 앞 빈칸에는 형용사, 동사 뒤 빈칸에는 부사가 온다.

examples.sentence: The team submitted a _____ report ahead of the deadline.
The negotiations proceeded _____ despite the tight schedule.
Investors reacted _____ to the announcement of record profits.

title: 최상급 표현
explanation: 셋 이상을 비교해 하나를 특정할 때는 'the + 최상급' 형태를 쓰며, 뒤에 흔히 'of/in/that ... has ever ...' 등이 이어진다.

examples.sentence: This is _____ effective marketing strategy the company has ever used.
Of all the candidates, she has _____ experience in project management.
The new headquarters is _____ building in the entire industrial park.

title: to부정사의 다양한 용법
explanation: to부정사는 목적(~하기 위해), 결과(~해서 결국), 형용사 뒤 보충 설명 등 여러 의미로 쓰인다.

examples.sentence: The company hired additional staff _____ the growing demand.
She worked overtime only _____ that the project was already finished.
The firm was quick _____ the new safety regulations.

title: 현재분사 vs 과거분사 (수식 대상)
explanation: 수식받는 명사가 동작을 직접 하면 현재분사(-ing), 동작을 당하면 과거분사(p.p.)를 쓴다.

examples.sentence: The employees _____ in the training session gave positive feedback.
The proposal _____ by the committee will be implemented next quarter.
The results _____ in the study surprised the research team.

title: 관계부사
explanation: where(장소), when(시간), why(이유), how(방법)는 완전한 절을 이끌며 선행사의 종류에 맞게 골라 쓴다.

examples.sentence: The factory _____ the products are manufactured is located in Busan.
The board scheduled the meeting for a time _____ all directors could attend.
The manager explained the reason _____ the deadline was extended.
